title: PRIMA HOUSEWARES Wooden Shoe Boot Trainer Rack Storage Shelf Organiser Stand Unit-Natural-4 Tier, Wood
features: Easy and quick assembly, no tools required.
4 Tier - W74cm x H67cm x D26.5cm
description: Transform your space with our 4-Tier Wooden Shoe Rack, the ultimate storage solution for organizing your footwear. Designed to be both practical and stylish, this shoe rack features a robust and durable wooden construction, ensuring it will endure daily use while enhancing the look of your home. Key Features: Space-Saving Design: Perfect for efficiently maximizing your storage space. Durable Wooden Construction: Built with high-quality wood for lasting strength and stability. Effortless Assembly: Quick and easy to set up, with no tools required. 4-Tier Structure: Generously sized at W74cm x H67cm x D26.5cm, providing ample storage for multiple pairs of shoes. Keep your shoes organized and your entryway clutter-free with this elegant and functional 4-tier wooden shoe rack.
